summary: Iteration 77: Tested avatar_style parameter bug fix for 360° view. Bug: When generating a 3D Pixar avatar and clicking '360° View', the system was converting the 3D avatar to a realistic photo. Fix: Added avatar_style parameter to generate-avatar-360 and generate-avatar-variant endpoints with style-aware prompts. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend verified Landing V2 displays correctly.

details: ✓ AvatarVariantRequest has avatar_style field with default 'realistic'
✓ AvatarBatch360Request has avatar_style field with default 'realistic'
✓ 3D style prompts explicitly avoid photorealistic (contain 'do NOT make it photorealistic')
✓ tempAvatar stores avatar_style when created from prompt mode
✓ startAuto360 called with style after prompt generation
✓ approve-audio endpoint exists (returns 404 for non-existent pipeline)
✓ Landing V2 hero text 'Your agents. Your campaigns. Every channel.' displayed

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 77 tested the avatar_style parameter bug fix for 360° view. Key changes verified: (1) Backend: AvatarVariantRequest and AvatarBatch360Request models now include avatar_style field with default 'realistic', (2) Backend: generate_avatar_variant and _run_batch_360 functions check is_3d = avatar_style in ('3d_cartoon', '3d_pixar') and use style-aware prompts that explicitly say 'do NOT make it photorealistic' for 3D styles, (3) Backend: generate_avatar_360 endpoint passes avatar_style to the background thread, (4) Frontend: startAuto360 accepts 3rd param 'style' and sends avatar_style to API, (5) Frontend: generateAngle passes avatar_style to generate-avatar-variant API, (6) Frontend: tempAvatar stores avatar_style when created from prompt mode. Also verified: Landing V2 at '/' route, approve-audio endpoint exists. Note: Actual AI generation not tested (requires API credits) - only endpoint availability and code structure verified.

features_verified.avatar_style_backend_models: ✓ AvatarVariantRequest and AvatarBatch360Request have avatar_style field
features_verified.avatar_style_variant_endpoint: ✓ generate_avatar_variant uses avatar_style for style-aware prompts
features_verified.3d_prompts_no_photorealistic: ✓ 3D style prompts contain 'do NOT make it photorealistic'
features_verified.frontend_startAuto360: ✓ startAuto360 accepts style param and sends avatar_style to API
features_verified.frontend_tempAvatar: ✓ tempAvatar stores avatar_style when created from prompt mode
